name: Drowsy Dreamer
descrip: A kinky energy drink that restores [ItemEnergy] Energy and boosts your Intelligence by 20 for 10 turns, but puts you into an Energy-draining drowsy state, removing 25 Energy every turn for 10 turns or until the effect is cured. {size=-10}Also works as a sleep aid!{/size}
useOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|DrowsyDreamerBuff|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|DrowsyDreamer|n|[AttackerName] downs the sweetly syrupy beverage and is instantly hit with a mentally stimulating rush of energy, sharply contrasted by a creeping sleepiness!
